mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_snapshot ( id, activity_id, product_id, title, cover, price, price_text, shop_id, shop_name, status, status_text, category_name, product_stock, sales, detail_url, promotion_start_time, promotion_end_time, activity_cos_ratio, activity_cos_ratio_text, cos_type, cos_type_text, ad_service_ratio, activity_ad_cos_ratio, has_douin_goods_tag, raw_payload, sync_time, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{snapshot.id}, #{snapshot.activityId}, #{snapshot.productId}, #{snapshot.title}, #{snapshot.cover}, #{snapshot.price}, #{snapshot.priceText}, #{snapshot.shopId}, #{snapshot.shopName}, #{snapshot.status}, #{snapshot.statusText}, #{snapshot.categoryName}, #{snapshot.productStock}, #{snapshot.sales}, #{snapshot.detailUrl}, #{snapshot.promotionStartTime}, #{snapshot.promotionEndTime}, #{snapshot.activityCosRatio}, #{snapshot.activityCosRatioText}, #{snapshot.cosType}, #{snapshot.cosTypeText}, #{snapshot.adServiceRatio}, #{snapshot.activityAdCosRatio}, #{snapshot.hasDouinGoodsTag}, #{snapshot.rawPayload}, #{snapshot.syncTime}, #{snapshot.createTime}, #{snapshot.updateTime}, #{snapshot.createBy}, #{snapshot.updateBy}, #{snapshot.deleted} ) ON CONFLICT (activity_id, product_id) DO UPDATE SET activity_id = EXCLUDED.activity_id, product_id = EXCLUDED.product_id, title = EXCLUDED.title, cover = EXCLUDED.cover, price = EXCLUDED.price, price_text = EXCLUDED.price_text, shop_id = EXCLUDED.shop_id, shop_name = EXCLUDED.shop_name, status = EXCLUDED.status, status_text = EXCLUDED.status_text, category_name = EXCLUDED.category_name, product_stock = EXCLUDED.product_stock, sales = EXCLUDED.sales, detail_url = EXCLUDED.detail_url, promotion_start_time = EXCLUDED.promotion_start_time, promotion_end_time = EXCLUDED.promotion_end_time, activity_cos_ratio = EXCLUDED.activity_cos_ratio, activity_cos_ratio_text = EXCLUDED.activity_cos_ratio_text, cos_type = EXCLUDED.cos_type, cos_type_text = EXCLUDED.cos_type_text, ad_service_ratio = EXCLUDED.ad_service_ratio, activity_ad_cos_ratio = EXCLUDED.activity_ad_cos_ratio, has_douin_goods_tag = EXCLUDED.has_douin_goods_tag, raw_payload = EXCLUDED.raw_payload, sync_time = EXCLUDED.sync_time, update_time = EXCLUDED.update_time, update_by = EXCLUDED.update_by, deleted = EXCLUDED.deleted
